textByHash.3df674daf7aa6617410533dfd8b682a7cedeb14c: Who dares to enter the Temple of Ikov!
textByHash.66b0027a9f08dcf97128e455364d211e39e80e9b: I haven't seen a pilgrim for thousands of years!
textByHash.f878a65a5fb927e239ca2a8357a7c41ff12080bd: Your puny weapons do nothing against me human! Come back when you can give me a real fight!
